pi_items.source: SQLite database query on Chinook database: SELECT PlaylistId FROM Playlist WHERE Name='Heavy Metal Classic'
SQLite database query: SELECT Name FROM Playlist WHERE PlaylistId = 17
SQLite database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PlaylistTrack WHERE PlaylistId = 17

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official Chinook sample database containing real media data from an iTunes library. The target playlist is PlaylistId 17 named 'Heavy Metal Classic' with exactly 26 track associations. The ODB file is located at /home/ga/chinook.odb. The task requires deleting all 26 PlaylistTrack records (PlaylistId = 17) and then the Playlist record itself (PlaylistId = 17) from the LibreOffice Base embedded HSQLDB database. The database contains 18 total playlists.
